====Pokémon====
{{anchor|Slowbro 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lorelei
|width=83
|pkmn=Slowbro
|type1=Water
|type2=Psychic
|img=Lorelei Slowbro PM.png
|epnum=PM033
|epname=To the Pokémon League!!
|desc={{p|Slowbro}} was first seen along with Lorelei's other Pokémon when she welcomed Red and her Pokémon to her school. When Clefairy was on fire from the sun rays coming from the giant magnifying glass, it shot water at Clefairy, cooling him off. After revealing herself, she wanted her Slowbro to attack Pikachu and Clefairy but stood there, much to her ire.

None of Slowbro's moves are known.}}

{{anchor|Dewgong 4}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lorelei
|pkmn=Dewgong
|type1=Water
|type2=Ice
|img=Lorelei Dewgong PM.png
|epnum=PM033
|epname=To the Pokémon League!!
|desc={{p|Dewgong}} was first seen along with Lorelei's other Pokémon when she welcomed Red and her Pokémon to her school. During a trick played on Clefairy, it participated in holding up a giant magnifying glass to the sun to burn Clefairy. During the battle when Lorelei revealed herself, Dewgong managed to freeze Clefairy but was beaten by Pikachu.

Dewgong's only known move is {{m|Aurora Beam}}.}}

{{anchor|Cloyster 3}}{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|trainer=Lorelei
|pkmn=Cloyster
|type1=Water
|type2=Ice
|img=Lorelei Cloyster PM.png
|epnum=PM033
|epname=To the Pokémon League!!
|desc={{p|Cloyster}} was first seen along with Lorelei's other Pokémon when she welcomed Red and his Pokémon to her school. It was mostly used as a weapon for Lorelei's tricks on Clefairy.}}

{{anchor|Jynx 3}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lorelei
|pkmn=Jynx
|gender=female
|type1=Ice
|type2=Psychic
|img=Lorelei Jynx PM.png
|epnum=PM033
|epname=To the Pokémon League!!
|desc={{p|Jynx}} was first seen along with Lorelei's other Pokémon when she welcomed Red and his Pokémon to her school. It held out {{TP|Lorelei|Cloyster}} and smacked Clefairy with it. She was one of the Pokémon responsible for holding up a magnifying glass at the sun, which burnt Clefairy. In the physical education class, Jynx jumped on a bouncer and managed to jump over a beam. When it was Clefairy's turn, she switched bouncers in order for Clefairy to land on it. During the battle when Lorelei removed her disguise, she gave a kiss to Clefairy but Clefairy did not succumb to the effects of her kiss, which resulted her in running off.

Jynx's only known move is {{m|Lovely Kiss}}.}}

{{anchor|Lapras 3}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lorelei
|pkmn=Lapras
|type1=Water
|type2=Ice
|img=Lorelei Lapras PM.png
|epnum=PM033
|epname=To the Pokémon League!!
|desc={{p|Lapras}} was first seen along with Lorelei's other Pokémon when she welcomed Red and his Pokémon to her school. It helped Jynx up when she wanted to hold up a magnifying glass at the sun. During the battle after Lorelei removed her disguise, it was taken out by Pikachu's electricity.

Lapras's only known move is {{m|Ice Beam}}.}}
